title: ESP32-WROOM PWM analog control voltage
prompt: I need a smooth analog control voltage from my ESP32-WROOM-32 to bias another circuit. Take a PWM GPIO, filter it with an RC low-pass so the output is the duty-averaged voltage, and read/feed that node. Firmware drives the PWM. For the bench test use 50% duty and expect roughly half the logic level at the filtered node.
